CustomField.description: If the Program purchased this property, the Contracted Sales Price. This is the price the program first paid to acquire this property. If a buyer-driven homeownership program, leave blank. Note: This field is not linked to Development Cost records.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If the Program purchased this property, the Contracted Sales Price. This is the price the program first paid to acquire this property. If a buyer-driven homeownership program, leave blank. Note: This field is not linked to Development Cost records.
CustomField.label: Purchase Price
